allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app_globals_0jn8.0u.css" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r.Content; Write-Host "Contains :root: $\($css -match ':root'\)"; Write-Host "Contains --bg: $\($css -match '--bg:'\)"; Write-Host "Contains mk-container: $\($css -match 'mk-container'\)"; Write-Host "First 300 chars:"; $css.Substring\(0, 300\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/plataforma" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match 'CtaSection|listo para activar'\) { "CtaSection presente" } else { "CtaSection NO encontrado" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app_globals_0jn8.0u.css" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r.Content; if \($css -match 'background: var\\\(--glass\\\)'\) { "glass-card usa var\(--glass\): SI" } else { "glass-card: NO" }; if \($css -match 'border: 1px solid var\\\(--glass-border\\\)'\) { "glass-border usa variable: SI" } else { "border var: NO" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app_globals_0jn8.0u.css" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r.Content; $idx = $css.IndexOf\('.mk-hero{'\); if \($idx -lt 0\) { $idx = $css.IndexOf\('.mk-hero {'\) }; if \($idx -ge 0\) { $css.Substring\($idx, 200\) } else { "NO ENCONTRADO - buscar alternativa"; $css.IndexOf\('mk-hero'\) })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app_globals_0jn8.0u.css" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r.Content; $idx = $css.IndexOf\('.mk-section{'\); if \($idx -lt 0\) { $idx = $css.IndexOf\('.mk-section {'\) }; if \($idx -ge 0\) { $css.Substring\($idx, 150\) } else { "NO ENCONTRADO"; $idx = $css.IndexOf\('mk-section'\); $css.Substring\($idx, 100\) })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/faq" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match 'min-h-\\[45vh\\]'\) { "FAQ hero con min-h: SI" } else { "FAQ hero min-h: NO" }; if \($html -match 'flex flex-col justify-center'\) { "justify-center: SI" } else { "NO" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/webs/landing" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; "register en Hero: $\($html -match '/register'\)"; "contacto en Pricing: $\($html -match '/contacto'\)"; "plataforma en nav: $\($html -match '/plataforma'\)"; "privacidad en footer: $\($html -match 'privacidad'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app_globals_0jn8.0u.css" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r.Content; "Tamaño CSS: $\($css.Length\) bytes"; "cb-fab existe: $\($css -match '\\.cb-fab'\)"; "cb-panel existe: $\($css -match '\\.cb-panel'\)"; "mk-glass-card existe: $\($css -match '\\.mk-glass-card'\)"; "chatbot keyframe: $\($css -match 'cb-pulse'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; "scrollProgress en HTML: $\($html -match 'scrollProgress'\)"; "global-glow en HTML: $\($html -match 'global-glow'\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app_globals_0jn8.0u.css" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r2.Content; "scrollbar CSS: $\($css -match 'webkit-scrollbar'\)"; "global-glow CSS: $\($css -match 'global-glow'\)"; "reveal CSS: $\($css -match '\\.reveal\\b'\)"; "spotlight CSS: $\($css -match 'mk-glass-card::after'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; $match = [regex]::Match\($html, 'href="\(/_next/static/chunks/app_globals[^"]+\)"'\); $cssUrl = $match.Groups[1].Value; "CSS URL: $cssUrl"; "scrollProgress en HTML: $\($html -match 'scrollProgress'\)"; "global-glow en HTML: $\($html -match 'global-glow'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; "back-to-top CSS: $\($html -match 'back-to-top'\)"; "GlobalEffects script: $\($html -match 'GlobalEffects|chatbot\\.js'\)"; $cssUrl = \([regex]::Match\($html, '"\(/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\\.css\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; "CSS: $cssUrl"; if \($cssUrl\) { $css = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000$cssUrl" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "back-to-top en CSS: $\($css -match 'back-to-top'\)"; "social-proof en CSS: $\($css -match 'social-proof-toast'\)"; "scrollbar en CSS: $\($css -match 'webkit-scrollbar'\)"; "CSS size: $\($css.Length\) bytes" })
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { $r.Content.Substring\(0, 500\) } else { "Error fetching page" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $cssUrl = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, '"\(/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\\.css\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000$cssUrl" -UseBasicParsing; "CSS OK: $\($r2.StatusCode\) - $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes"; $css = $r2.Content; "back-to-top: $\($css -match 'back-to-top'\)"; "social-proof: $\($css -match 'social-proof-toast'\)"; "global-glow: $\($css -match 'global-glow'\)"; "scrollbar: $\($css -match 'webkit-scrollbar'\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $cssUrl = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, '"\(/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\\.css\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; Write-Host "URL: $cssUrl"; $resp = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\("http://127.0.0.1:3000$cssUrl"\); try { $resp.GetResponse\(\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,800\) })

PowerShell($cssUrl = "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/0.0r4_g5trxdw.css"; $req = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\($cssUrl\); try { $req.GetResponse\(\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host $body })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/0.0r4_g5trxdw.css" -UseBasicParsing; "OK: $\($r2.StatusCode\) - $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "STILL FAILING" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $cssUrl = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, '"\(/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\\.css\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; "New CSS: $cssUrl"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000$cssUrl" -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\) - $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "FAIL: 500" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $head = $r.Content.Substring\(0, 1500\); if \($head -match 'turbopack|hmr'\) { "MODO: Turbopack DEV" } else { "MODO: Production" }; $head.Substring\(0,800\))

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $cssUrl = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, '"\(/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\\.css\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; "CSS: $cssUrl"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000$cssUrl" -UseBasicParsing; "OK: $\($r2.StatusCode\) - $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes"; $css=$r2.Content; "global-glow: $\($css -match 'global-glow'\)"; "back-to-top: $\($css -match 'back-to-top'\)"; "social-proof: $\($css -match 'social-proof'\)" } catch { "FAIL" })
